name: VanEck Merk Gold ETF
business: The Trust is an exchange-traded fund that holds gold bullion. The primary objective is to provide investors with an opportunity to invest in gold through the Shares and be able to take delivery of physical gold in exchange for their Shares. The secondary objective is for the Shares to reflect the performance of the price of gold less the expenses of the Trust's operations.

exposures.sentence: The Trust's primary objective is to provide investors with an opportunity to invest in gold through the Shares and be able to take delivery of physical gold in exchange for their Shares.
